task: Add practical live-product field research mode to recommerce OJT

requirements.requirement: Use a specific real product instead of a simulated quiz
requirements.evidence: Public Ownerclan product WFIR5I7 is the fixed case with source link and observation date
User opens source, transcribes current price and shipping, calculates economics, identifies evidence gaps and prepares inquiry

requirements.requirement: Prevent accidental purchase or external communication
requirements.evidence: No purchase API or message submission exists; inquiry is clipboard-only and UI explicitly keeps order and sending locked
Live unit economics and HOLD or review-needed state update from user observations

governance_bootstrap.summary: Applied mobile-first workflow, human capital-action boundary, real-entrypoint verification and completion evidence requirements.
Applied origin-main scoped deployment, secret protection, no automatic Red Team and production verification invariants.

verification.name: live public supplier-page evidence review
verification.result: observed product code WFIR5I7, displayed price 1,290 KRW, shipping 3,000 KRW, return shipping 4,000 KRW, zero reviews and incomplete identity details on 2026-07-19

verification.name: frontend production dist build and changed-page lint
verification.command: npm run build then eslint src/pages/RecommercePage.tsx
verification.result: passed: index-CHqESUMc.js, index-IbmhG9wA.css, zero changed-page lint findings

verification.name: focused recommerce regression suite
verification.result: passed 15 tests; real supplier and SKU workspace state remains untouched

residual_risk: Mac Mini production deployment and served-bundle verification remain pending.
Public supplier facts can change after the observation date; UI tells user to re-check the source rather than treating the snapshot as current truth.
No supplier inquiry was sent and no sample was ordered, so stock, identity, defect rate and negotiated price remain unverified.
